DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF RBS CITIZENS, N.A., TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S WRITTEN ORDER. SANCTIONS AWARDED IN FAVOR OF MOVING PARTY AND DEFENDANT DONALD ST. LOUIS AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF RBS CITIZENS, N.A. IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,110, TO BE PAID WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S WRITTEN ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE THE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: SIGRID IRIAS; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance.
Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385.
Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Continued To Jan-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DONALD ST LOUIS Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is granted. Plaintiff RBS Citizens, N.A., to provide verified responses to defendant's form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and document requests within 20 days of notice of the court's written order. Sanctions awarded in favor of moving party and defendant Donald St. Louis and against plaintiff RBS Citizens, N.A. in the amount of $1,110, to be paid within 20 days of notice of the court's written order. Prevailing party to prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Continued To Jun-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. DEFENDANT DONALD ST LOUIS Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is continued to June 13, 2016. The Judge Pro Tem recuses himself. (D302)

Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Continued To Jun-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. DEFENDANT DONALD ST LOUIS Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is continued to June 1, 2016. The Court is recused due to conflicts. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
